markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content creation workflow to improve article quality.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** A mandatory outline review step is now required to ensure early alignment on article structure and content, preventing generic drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Artifacts First:** All new content production is paused until the writing guidelines and a new product use cases doc are updated, ensuring a consistent brand voice and specific examples.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Feedback Protocol:** All feedback must be left in Airtable, tagging Nathalie Schrans (`@Nathalie Schrans`) to guarantee notification and prevent missed comments.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The new workflow will cause a minor delay (1–2 days) for the next three articles, but this is a temporary investment to improve long-term efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Generic Content & Inconsistent Tone

  - [The first "calibration" article was too generic and lacked specific examples, despite conflicting feedback from multiple reviewers (Becerra, Callie).](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [The brand voice was inconsistent, remaining too "marketing-focused" instead of adopting the desired "talk like a builder" tone.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [This issue stemmed from using outdated writing guidelines that did not incorporate Dhruv's previous Notion comments.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Solution: New Workflow & Artifacts

  - [**Mandatory Outline Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Why:** To prevent generic drafts by ensuring early alignment on structure and content.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX generates an outline using SEMrush API data (for ranking) and Perplexity (for search intent), then sends it to the client for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [**Impact:** Adds a 1–2 day delay to the next three articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**Updated Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Writing Guidelines:** GrowthX will first apply Dhruv's existing Notion comments, then notify him for a final review.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Product Use Cases Doc:** A new document for the client to provide specific examples (e.g., customer stories) to enrich articles. This will be integrated into the outline review step.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### SEO Strategy: Word Count vs. Quality

  - [**Client Concern:** Balancing SEO-driven word count with concise, high-quality writing.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**GrowthX Position:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Minimum:** Aim for \~1,200 words to cover subtopics and fulfill search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Priority:** Avoid fluff. A 3,000-word article is acceptable if well-structured (e.g., bullets, tables) to maintain readability.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Human Experience:** For long articles, add a "Key Takeaways" or TLDR section at the top.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathalie Schrans:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Share the V2 calibration article for publication by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Revise writing guidelines with Dhruv's existing Notion comments, then notify him for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Dhruv Amin & Callie:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Populate the "Product Use Cases and Examples" doc with specific examples.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Aida Knezevic:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [Record and share a video walkthrough of the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [Use the new Airtable feedback protocol: tag Nathalie Schrans (`@Nathalie Schrans`) in comments to ensure notification.](https://fathom.video/share/zD2BE58RNZUq31FJ9iMtmy8haKKBByxZ?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
